name: B.E.S. Crystal Core
effectText: If this card is Normal Summoned: Place 3 counters on this card. Cannot be destroyed by battle. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled: Remove 1 counter from this card, or if you cannot, destroy this card. Once per turn: You can target 1 Attack Position monster your opponent controls; change that target to face-up Defense Position.
